name: iOS App
requiredVerification: UI tests for critical flows where present
simulator launch or screenshot evidence for UI changes
releaseChecks: signing, entitlements, Info.plist, privacy strings, and provisioning configuration are technically reviewed by Codex when touched
simulator or device launch evidence captured for UI and runtime changes

exact user consent is required only for a prepared App Store or TestFlight publication, IAP or value-transfer effect, provider-account action, real-user communication, or irreversible production-data effect

may: edit Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, tests, previews, signing configuration references, and documentation inside the current governed task scope
diagnose and repair build, simulator, entitlement, Keychain policy, permission, migration, and test failures from project evidence
mustNot: delegate signing, provisioning, entitlement, Keychain, permission, migration, dependency, or test strategy choices to the user

use external developer-account credentials, publish to App Store or TestFlight, create an IAP or value-transfer effect, communicate with real users, or perform an irreversible production-data effect without exact consent
